basic_details.job_title: CID Jharkhand Chief Technical Officer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Candidates who are interested in applying for the CID Jharkhand Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form.

qualification.education_qualification: B.E. in IT/Computer Science/Equivalent or MCA, M.Tech in CS/IT/Information Security (desirable), Minimum 5 years experience in IT
qualification.details: Chief Technical Officer: Bachelor of Engineering in IT, Computer Science or equivalent or MCA from a recognized Institute. M.Tech in CS/IT/Information Security desirable. Minimum 5 years work experience in IT. Proficiency in security/forensic tools, programming/scripting, data analysis, hardware extraction, networking protocols, wireless technologies. Global certifications like CEH/CISM/CISSP preferable.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for CID Jharkhand Chief Technical Officer Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.jhpolice.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
